name: Zoho CRM
highlight_text: Category: Budget-Friendly CRM with AI & Automation
description:
What Zoho CRM Does

Zoho CRM offers a cost-effective alternative for growing agencies that need robust sales and marketing capabilities without the enterprise price tag. It’s known for versatility, AI-driven insights, and flexibility across industries.

‍

Source: Zoho

Key Features

🏆Automation with lead assignment, follow‑up reminders, and deal stage changes. 🏆Process management (Blueprints) to design step‑by‑step sales processes.

🏆Omnichannel communication to manage emails, phone calls, social messages, and live chat.

🏆Customized reporting & analytics dashboards.

🏆AI assistant (Zia) for predictions on win probability, recommended next actions, and anomaly alerts.

Benefits

  • Affordable tiers: The Free Edition supports up to 3 users. Standard is affordable and scalable for small businesses.
  • Customization: Extensive custom modules, layouts, and workflow rules adapt to unique sales processes.
  • Integrated ecosystem: Connects seamlessly with Zoho’s 40+ applications, such as campaigns, finance, projects, and analytics.

Pricing

  • Free: For up to three users
  • Standard: US $14 per user/month when billed annually 
  • Professional: US $14 per user/month
  • Enterprise: US $40 per user/month
  • Ultimate: US $52 per user/month

Pros

✅ Strong AI features at an affordable price

✅ Excellent integration options

✅ Customizable automation

Cons

🚫 Interface feels dated compared to newer CRMs

🚫 Steeper learning curve for setup

‍
what_people_say:
What Customers Say

“From robust sales force automation that tracks leads and deals with unparalleled precision, to insightful marketing campaign management and detailed analytics, it covers every touchpoint of the customer journey… I only dislike some of the limitations with the way fields can be created.”

– Verified User in Accounting

‍
